goal: Give JARVIS read-only /api/jarvis/ask two ways to report the same true state: Executive Mode (default) translates internal facts into customer/investor/demo-friendly business language and hides raw implementation detail (exact counts, report names, raw warning text, posture flags); Operator Mode (on request) exposes the full technical briefing. Both modes keep the trading-safety phrasing and every read-only rule.

classifier.change: Added SAFE_INFO regex patterns for operator-mode triggers. Forbidden patterns still matched FIRST and unchanged.

answer_layer.translation_layer: Added _exec_health_phrase (commander state -> business health), _exec_research_phrase (factory state -> 'Research activity is progressing normally'), _exec_candidate_phrase (candidate count -> 'Several strategy candidates are currently under evaluation'), _exec_attention_phrase (warnings -> 'Some maintenance items require attention, and there are a few project housekeeping tasks that should be reviewed').
answer_layer.mode_flag: _operator = 'operator mode' | 'technical detail' | 'show technical' | ('show' and 'detail') | 'diagnostic' | 'exact count' | 'exact status'.
answer_layer.bare_operator_fallback: A bare operator request (operator mode / diagnostics / show technical details) with no other recognised intent returns the full technical operator briefing.
answer_layer.executive_structure: Greeting -> business status (SPARTA Brain is online + translated commander health) -> research status (translated, no counts/report names) -> trading status (observation-only, no live or paper trades, no performance) -> attention items (translated, no raw warning text/counts) -> recommended next action.
reads_only: api_jarvis_status aggregate (commander_snapshot, system_core, factory_status, candidate_registry, trading_detail, recommended_next_actions)

implementation.template_note: Voice + conversation mode already post to /api/jarvis/ask, so they inherit both modes with no template edit.

translation_examples.7 research candidates tracked: Several strategy candidates are currently under evaluation.
translation_examples.Large untracked backlog: There are project housekeeping tasks that should be reviewed.

tests_reconciled_note: Briefings are now executive (translated) by default, so raw posture/factory tokens (read_only=true, strategy factory, paper_ready=false) were moved from the default-briefing assertions into the new operator-mode tests. The plain-English safety phrasing (observation-only, no live or paper trades were executed) is still asserted in the default briefing.

test_results.invocation_note: Run from tests/ with PYTHONPATH=.. and --noconftest to avoid a pre-existing corrupt repo-root directory ('hydra ' = private-use char + trailing space) that breaks pytest root enumeration; unrelated to this change.

commit_note: Awaiting approval per bundle commit policy.
